name: ide-super-worker
description: Cost-saving async MCP worker for Codex that runs Claude Code through cheap OpenAI-compatible gateways.

scripts.codex:guard: npm run codex:audit -- --since-minutes=60 && npm run stats:gate
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/tests/core.test.js && node dist/tests/routing_contract.test.js && node dist/tests/outcome.test.js && node dist/tests/outcome_integration.test.js && node dist/tests/semantic_review.test.js && node dist/tests/evaluation.test.js && node dist/tests/formal_evaluation.test.js && node dist/tests/checks_contract.test.js && node dist/tests/metrics_eval_context.test.js && node dist/tests/promo_publish.test.js && node dist/tests/fanout.test.js && node dist/tests/evidence_delivery.test.js && node dist/tests/failure_semantics.test.js

author: luzmatrix002
